overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a blue shirt and cowboy hat walking through a scenic prairie landscape at golden hour. The character traverses a dirt path through rolling grasslands with a distinctive rock butte visible in the distance, encounters a horseback rider, and continues toward a sunlit rocky ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with prominent rock butte landmark

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead from left to right across the sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation with flat top rising from the prairie
distant snow-capped mountains under cloudy skies
solitary trees with green foliage dotting the grassland
worn earth path cutting through tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open prairie, heading toward a distinctive layered rock butte that dominates the center of the view. The landscape features rolling green hills, scattered oak trees, and distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky. A flock of birds flies overhead as the character maintains a steady pace.

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from the right horizon and passes by the character on the trail

agents.ego_description: pauses and turns slightly to watch the horseback rider gallop past on the trail

notable_agents.action: rider on dark horse galloping from right to left across the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, the large rock butte passes behind on the left and exits view. The landscape opens into rolling grassland hills. A rider on horseback suddenly appears on the right horizon and gallops past, causing the character to pause briefly and watch them pass before continuing.

agents.ego_description: resumes walking along the path toward the bright sun and rocky outcrop ahead

entered.detail: sunlit rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation creating a bright silhouette against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dirt trail, now facing directly into the bright golden hour sun which creates a strong backlight and lens flare. A rocky ridge looms ahead on the path, while the distant mountains shift to the left side of the frame. The vegetation becomes sparser as the trail ascends slightly toward the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that transitions from a vista dominated by a rock butte into a sun-drenched ascent toward a rocky ridge. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail toward a layered rock butte under a partly cloudy sky, while a flock of birds flies over the rolling green hills. As the character progresses, the butte recedes behind to the left and the landscape opens into wide grasslands, where a rider on horseback suddenly gallops past on the right horizon. The scene then shifts as the character continues forward, facing directly into the bright golden hour sun which creates a strong backlight and lens flare. Finally, the vegetation becomes sparser and the trail ascends slightly, moving toward a looming rocky ridge as the distant mountains shift to the left of the frame.
